    checkRateLimit
      ΓêÜ should allow first message (6 ms)
      ΓêÜ should allow up to 10 messages (27 ms)
      ΓêÜ should block 11th message (12 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reset after 60 seconds (16 ms)
    getRemainingMessages
      ΓêÜ should return 10 for new user (11 ms)
      ΓêÜ should decrease after each message (10 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 0 when limit exceeded (19 ms)
    getResetTime
      ΓêÜ should return 0 for new user (11 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return countdown in seconds (15 ms)
      ΓêÜ should decrease over time (13 ms)
    resetRateLimit
      ΓêÜ should reset user rate limit (13 ms)
